data.title: Microservices
data.description: Amazon utilizes a microservices architecture to allow independent deployment and scaling of individual services.
data.technical_spec: Decoupled services with RESTful APIs, typically using AWS ECS or Kubernetes.

data.title: Data Centers
data.description: Globally distributed data centers ensure low latency and high availability.
data.technical_spec: Leveraging AWS regions for redundancy and load balancing.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Serverless architecture for handling unpredictable traffic spikes effectively.
data.technical_spec: AWS Lambda functions trigger for event-driven processes.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Utilizes CDN to deliver content with minimal latency to users worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Amazon CloudFront integrates with AWS S3, providing quick delivery.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Flexible and scalable database services for managing extensive datasets.
data.technical_spec: AWS RDS and DynamoDB for relational and NoSQL databases.
